{{Quote|For a decrepit space station out in the middle of nowhere it's not so bad. As a matter of fact, it could be worse.|[[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe]]|<ref name="PSG" />}}
'''Darknon Station''' was a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] on the [[Itani Run]], near the edge of the [[Itani Nebula/Legends|Itani Nebula]].

==History==
The station was built near the [[Hyperspace beacon/Legends|navigational beacon]] known as [[Darknon Beacon]]. Over the years, the trade routes shifted and it lost significance, decaying into a half-abandoned ghostly shell of its former self.

It featured eighteen docking bays, only six of which were still functional by the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Darknon's other amenities included the [[Stormview Lounge]], [[Galaxy Shop]], and the abandoned [[Van Serai Hotel]]. The young customs officer Sergeant [[Nethius]] was placed on Darknon by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] to protect a [[Imperial research station (Itani Nebula)|secret research station]] hidden in the [[Itani Nebula/Legends|Itani Nebula]].

[[File:Darknon_Station_schematic.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Darknon Station schematic]]
